title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: CLATSOP COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH AND MOBILE UNIT OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. This clinic also offers vasectomy procedures. 820 Exchange Street Suite 100 Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8:45am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 325-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Served by Sunset Empire Transportation District Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH AND MOBILE UNIT
